productDisplayName: Puma Men's Webster Navy Grey Flip Flop
description: CompositionNavy blue, white and black flip flops made with rubber, synthetic straps and rubber outsoleCare1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis absolutely stylish pair of navy blue flip flops from puma are great for casual wear. The cushioned footbed with the sun ray design ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the sleek black and white straps with the brand logo is a perfect combination of comfort and style. The outsole with triangular grooves ensures great grip, doubling this into an ideal beachwear too.
